sanskrit:
न च मत्स्थानि भूतानि पश्य मे योगमैश्वरम्।
भूतभृन्न च भूतस्थो ममात्मा भूतभावनः॥
transliteration:
na ca mat-sthāni bhūtāni paśya me yogam aiśvaram |
bhūta-bhṛn na ca bhūta-stho mamātmā bhūta-bhāvanaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Not / and / in Me / situated / all beings / behold / My / mystic power / supreme // sustaining beings / not / and / situated in creation / My / Self / source of all beings
contextual_meaning: Krishna reveals a paradox: everything depends on Him yet He remains untouched, modeling psychological non-attachment while fully engaged.
psychological_state: Secure-autonomous attachment: total presence without loss of self-boundaries.
trigger_scenario: A caregiver supports a loved one through crisis without absorbing their distress, staying emotionally available yet internally steady.
anchor_text: Hold everything lovingly, yet let nothing hold you.
